subject: How is tomostar wrpAxisAngle generated?
body:
Hello,

Does anyone know how wrpAxisAngle in the tomostar file is generated? From 
the github it looks like some transformation of the offset coordinates. I 
suppose we would expect it to come out to be the same as the tilt axis 
offset?

I have some data where the warp reconstructions differ substantially from 
reconstructions made in etomo (with the same xf) and they have a different 
wrpAxisAngle in the tomostars than the known tilt axis angle, where I have 
seen in the past they've been the same, and I wonder if this could be where 
my reconstructions are going wrong.


Best,
Joe.
